_comment: Optional. Copy to products.json in the shop-data folder to override the built-in pricing. Prices are in minor units (øre) — 19500 = 195 DKK. printProducts are fixed paper sizes (printSize in cm). digitalTiers are capped on the long edge, flat-priced (same product whatever camera shot it). masterBrackets price the full-resolution Master by the file's megapixels — so a medium-format master commands a premium. First bracket whose maxMP the file is within sets the price.
